calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-15-2023 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Default Judgment Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Aug-30-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being set for hearing on Plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment on Quiet Title against Michael Wells, as administrator of the Irene Wells Estate.

Dept. 505; Judge Christopher Hite; Clerk: K. Valdes; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 2:13 p.m.; and concluded at 2:21 p.m.

Robert Cowan, Esq., representing Willie Mae Holmes.
Plaintiff Willie Mae Holmes not appearing.
Defendant Michael Wells, as administrator of the Irene Well Estate not appearing.

Complaint of Quiet Title filed on January 17, 2019.
1st Amended Complaint of Quiet Title filed December 23, 2021.
Proof of service of 1st Amended Complaint and Summons filed on July 12, 2022.
Dismissal against Defendant Does 1-50 filed on September 29, 2022.
Dismissal against Defendant Testate and intestate successors, persons unknown, claiming any legal or equitable right, title, estate, lien, or interest in the property filed on January 11, 2023.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Wille Mae Holmes against Defendant Michael Wells, as administrator of the Irene Well Estate as follows:

Willie Mae Holmes is owner fee simple of the realty commonly known as 1574 Thomas Avenue, San Francisco, California.
And Specifically described as Beginning at a point on the southwesterly line of Thomas Avenue, distant thereon 175 feet northwesterly from the northwesterly lineof Jennings Street; running thence northwesterly along said line of Thomas venue 25 feet; thence at a right angle southwesterly 100 feet; thence at a right angle southwesterly 25 feet; thence at a right angle northeasterly 100 feet to the point of beginning.
Being a portion of lot 3, in Block 402, South San Francisco Homestead and Railroad Association.

Proposed order signed and filed.
